title: acer italum f. tomentellum
intro: Acer italum f. tomentellum, also known as the Italian maple or woolly maple, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Acer italum f. tomentellum lie in its bark, which contains flavonoids and phenolic acids that have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and boosting the immune system. Acer italum f. tomentellum can be prepared as a herbal tea, decoction, or infusion, and is also used in traditional medicine as a powder or tincture.
